entries.reason: Read-only branch introspection used by hooks.
Read-only repository inspection used by hooks.
Read-only status check used by hooks.
Read-only diff summary used by hooks.
Read-only ref inspection used by hooks.
Read-only remote inspection used by hooks.
Read-only branch listing used by hooks.
Read-only log inspection used by hooks.

Direct git switch -c is blocked. For new implementation work, use /codex-gh-issue-start plus fu_git start_issue --body-file ... so the issue, branch, and worktree are created as one SSOT unit. Use create_branch only for explicit non-issue repair work.

Direct git checkout -b is blocked. For new implementation work, use /codex-gh-issue-start plus fu_git start_issue --body-file ... so the issue, branch, and worktree are created as one SSOT unit. Use create_branch only for explicit non-issue repair work.
Direct git switch is blocked. Use fu_git switch_branch <branch> to change to an existing branch.
Direct git checkout is blocked. Use fu_git switch_branch <branch> for existing branches or fu_git create_branch <branch> for new ones.
Direct git commit is blocked. Use fu_git create_commit ISSUE --items A --type feat --description ...; it stages, validates, commits, and pushes.
Direct git add is blocked. Use fu_git create_commit ISSUE --items A --type feat --description ... so staging, validation, commit, and push stay issue-linked and auditable.
Direct git worktree/index mutation is blocked. Use the academic-git commit workflow with explicit paths so file changes stay issue-linked and auditable.
Direct git push is blocked. Push is automatic after fu_git create_commit ISSUE --items ... --type ... --description ....
Direct git merge is blocked. Use the merge-pr skill and fu_git merge_pr <pr-number> for the PR completion path.
Direct git tag is blocked. Use create_tag(name, message) for traceable milestone tags.

Direct gh issue create is blocked. For implementation work, use /codex-gh-issue-start plus fu_git start_issue --body-file ... so the issue, branch, and worktree are created as one SSOT unit. Use fu_git create_issue only for explicit standalone bookkeeping issues.
Direct gh issue edit is blocked. Use refine_issue(issue, action, items_affected, detail, reason, requested_by) so issue history stays append-only.
Direct gh issue close is blocked. Use close_issue(issue, comment?, reason?, duplicate_of?) so closure stays explicit and auditable.
Direct gh pr create is blocked. Use fu_git prepare_pr ISSUE and fu_git open_pr ISSUE --title ... --body ... after the checklist is complete.
Direct gh pr merge is blocked. Use the merge-pr skill and fu_git merge_pr <pr-number> so merge, cleanup, and branch/worktree handling stay coordinated.
Direct gh pr close is blocked. Use close_pr(pr, comment?, delete_branch?) for explicit abandonment or superseded PRs.
Direct git stash is blocked. Keep the worktree dirty and rely on session auto-save or a formal commit when ready.
Direct git reset is blocked. History rewrites are not routed through academic-git.
Direct git rebase is blocked. History rewrites are not routed through academic-git.
Direct git cherry-pick is blocked. History rewrites are not routed through academic-git.
Direct git revert is blocked. History rewrites are not routed through academic-git.
Direct gh api is blocked. Use narrow workflow commands instead of the raw GitHub API escape hatch.
